verdicts.title: Template-imported AI to-do places (source:'ai') are silently DELETED on the new owner's first Accept Plan
verdicts.reasoning: Verified the full chain: addOrUpdatePlaceFromVerified stamps source:'ai'+forManual:true (markedPlaces.ts:314-320) and Accept Plan persists them via upsertTrip (useAiPlan.ts:532/543/558/563); _clean_marked_places only pops dayId/timeOfDay so source:'ai' survives into the snapshot (templates.py:106-107) and is re-written into the new trip by _instantiate_template (templates.py:220,251); the new owner's first Accept Plan calls dropAITaggedPlaces which filters out EVERY source==='ai' place (useAiPlan.ts:459, markedPlaces.ts:347), and the recent fix (commit 3186648) only stopped the promote-to-'ai' path (markedPlaces.ts:262-271), not pre-stamped imports — clone copies marked_places_json verbatim too (trips.py:1309), so the sibling vector is real; scoped to AI-tagged to-dos and triggered only by running the planner, hence P1 not P0.

verdicts.title: Instantiated template (and clone) day rows keep NULL dates that never populate when the new owner sets a trip date range
verdicts.reasoning: Confirmed _instantiate_template inserts every day with date=NULL (templates.py:285), and in Edit Trip numberedDays filters dayNumber>0 (trip.ts:312-313) so dateless instantiated days take the else-branch (not the length===0 scaffold path); prefill is numberedDays[0].date||'' = '' (trip.ts:319), so oldFirst/oldLast=parseUTC('')=null (trip.ts:527-528) and startChanged/endChanged short-circuit to false (trip.ts:532-535), so no date is ever written to the day rows — finalizeAndClose only sets trip.dateFrom/dateTo and persists scaffolded/rebased/renumbered, none of which carry a fresh date (trip.ts:601-621); no data loss, only degraded per-day dates, hence P2.

verdicts.title: Public template preview counts the internal Trip-Hub anchor as a day (off-by-one 'days planned') and renders it as a ★ row to strangers
verdicts.reasoning: Confirmed the day-0 'Trip Hub' anchor is a real persisted trip_days row (handlers.ts:246-266 builds dayNumber:0 and calls upsertDay), the snapshot query has no day_number>0 filter (templates.py:162-167) so day 0 is included, dayCount=len(days) counts it (templates.py:527), and template.html:106-111 renders dayNumber==0 as a ★ Trip Hub row with an empty (but truthy) plan dict; this is a purely cosmetic off-by-one count plus a phantom contentless row with no sensitive content and no data/functional impact, so P3 rather than P2.
